ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "cookie_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "petitioner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the petitioner or entity managing the cookie */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain where the cookie is used */,
  "retention_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the retention period of the cookie */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purpose of the cookie */,
  "cookie_type" TEXT /* Type of the cookie (e.g., HTTP, secure, session, persistent) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the cookie was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the cookie was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is currently active */,
  "data_collected" TEXT /* Type of data collected by the cookie */,
  "consent_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if user consent is required for the cookie */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the managing department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_retention_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("retention_period_id") REFERENCES retention_periods ("retention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES cookie_purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_petitioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("petitioner_id") REFERENCES petitioners ("petitioner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "petitioners" (
  "petitioner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each petitioner */,
  "petitioner_name" TEXT /* Name of the petitioner entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the petitioner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the petitioner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the petitioner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the petitioner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the petitioner was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the petitioner's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("petitioner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the domain was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the domain's information */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the managing department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retention_periods" (
  "retention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention period */,
  "retention_description" TEXT /* Description of the retention period (e.g., Session, Persistent) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the retention period was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the retention period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie that was used */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cookie was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cookie */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, consent) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "cookie_value" TEXT /* Value of the cookie at the time of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_usage_logs_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user's information */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose of cookie usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the purpose was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the purpose */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the purpose is mandatory for the website to function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the department's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
